badge.licenseNote: Google Fonts; SIL Open Font License. Free for commercial web and packaging use under OFL terms.
badge.usage: Functional badges, short product facts, navigation labels, CTA buttons, small caps, venue-card seals and pack callouts. Use uppercase with moderate tracking; never let badges dominate the brand story.

body.licenseNote: Google Fonts; SIL Open Font License. Free for commercial web and packaging use under OFL terms.
body.usage: Body copy, menus, product descriptions, web UI, captions and explanatory text. Use Regular for paragraphs, Medium for short labels and Semibold for navigation.

competitorInspiration: Kin Euphorics influenced the expressive, mood-led headline approach; Lyre’s and Seedlip informed the need for adult hospitality polish and controlled hierarchy. Ole cocktails and Poppi support a more vibrant social rhythm, but the system avoids their more overt canned-cocktail or soda-pop extremes. LMNT, NOCCO and other functional references are useful mainly as anti-inspiration: PEP should not use condensed performance type, clinical claim grids or supplement-style proof hierarchy.

display.licenseNote: Google Fonts; SIL Open Font License. Free for commercial web and packaging use under OFL terms.
display.usage: Main wordmark direction, campaign headlines, can-front flavour names, website hero headlines and large social statements. Use at large sizes with tight leading for a juicy premium feel.

pairingRationale: Fraunces gives PEP a warm, flavourful, premium headline voice that feels more like a social serve than a sports drink. DM Sans keeps information clear and modern, which is important because protein, calories and gluten-free claims still need to be easy to understand without becoming the identity. Lobster Two adds a small hospitality flourish for serve language, while Space Grotesk makes badges feel crisp and intentional rather than clinical; together the set balances fun, credibility and orderability.

script.licenseNote: Google Fonts; SIL Open Font License. Free for commercial web and packaging use under OFL terms.
script.usage: Sparing accent phrases only: serve notes, flavour flourishes, social captions and small hospitality moments. Do not use for long copy or core claims.
